2605.20616.title: Auto-Dreamer: Learning Offline Memory Consolidation for Language Agents
2605.20616.paper_summary: Language agents increasingly operate over streams of related tasks, yet existing memory systems struggle to convert accumulated experience into reusable knowledge. Retrieval-augmented and structured memory methods record per-session observations effectively, but often couple acquisition and consolidation into a single online process, leaving the agent without a global view across sessions to discover recurring patterns, abstract shared procedures, or prune redundant entries. Inspired by complementary learning systems theory, we propose Auto-Dreamer, a learned offline consolidator for language-agent memory. Auto-Dreamer decouples fast per-session memory acquisition from slow cross-session consolidation. Given a selected working region of a typed memory bank, the consolidator treats the region as read-only evidence, performs bounded tool-use to inspect entries and provenance-linked source trajectories, and synthesizes a fresh compact replacement set that abstracts across sessions and supersedes the original region. We train Auto-Dreamer via GRPO, using end-to-end agent performance as the reward signal to learn how to consolidate memories acquired through fast online experience. Trained on ScienceWorld trajectories alone, Auto-Dreamer outperforms fixed, RL-trained, and prompted memory baselines on ScienceWorld by 7 points while using an active memory bank 12$\times$ smaller than the strongest baseline, and continues to lead on held-out ALFWorld and WebArena without retraining -- using 6$\times$ less memory than the strongest baseline on ALFWorld.
2605.20616.paper_summary_zh: 語言代理人越來越多地在相關任務的流中運作，但現有的記憶系統在將累積的經驗轉化為可重用的知識方面面臨困難。檢索增強和結構化記憶方法有效地記錄每次會話的觀察，但通常將獲取和鞏固結合為單一的在線過程，導致代理人無法在會話之間獲得全球視野，以發現重複模式、抽象共享程序或修剪冗餘條目。受到互補學習系統理論的啟發，我們提出了 Auto-Dreamer，一種用於語言代理記憶的學習離線鞏固器。Auto-Dreamer 將快速的每次會話記憶獲取與緩慢的跨會話鞏固解耦。給定一個選定的類型記憶庫的工作區域，鞏固器將該區域視為只讀證據，執行有限的工具使用來檢查條目和來源鏈接的源軌跡，並綜合出一個新的緊湊替代集，該集跨會話抽象並取代原始區域。我們通過 GRPO 訓練 Auto-Dreamer，使用端到端代理性能作為獎勵信號，以學習如何鞏固通過快速在線經驗獲得的記憶。僅在 ScienceWorld 軌跡上訓練的 Auto-Dreamer，在 ScienceWorld 上的表現超過了固定的、強化學習訓練的和提示的記憶基準 7 分，同時使用的活動記憶庫比最強基準小 12$\times$，並且在未重新訓練的情況下，繼續在保留的 ALFWorld 和 WebArena 上領先——在 ALFWorld 上使用的記憶比最強基準少 6$\times$。
2605.20616.author: Chongrui Ye et.al.
2605.20616.authors: Chongrui Ye, Yuxiang Liu, Yu Wang, Haofei Yu, Yining Zhao, Ge Liu, Julian McAuley, Jiaxuan You
